name: rua-galeria-urbana
description: Galeria de arte urbana RUA — web, PWA e Android

scripts.android:add: npm run web:prepare && cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run web:prepare && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
